Related Entities

  • hospital SENTARA WILLIAMSBURG REGIONAL MEDICAL CENTER 4-star overall rating
  • hospital RIVERSIDE DOCTORS' HOSPITAL OF WILLIAMSBURG 4-star overall rating
  • hospital THE PAVILION AT WILLIAMSBURG PLACE
  • snf WOODHAVEN HALL AT WILLIAMSBURG LANDING 3-star, 73 beds
  • snf Jamestown Health and Rehabilitation 4-star, 90 beds
  • snf WILLIAMSBURG POST ACUTE & REHABILITATION 3-star, 130 beds
  • snf RIVERSIDE LIFELONG HEALTH & REHABILITATION PATRI 4-star, 60 beds
  • snf WINDSORMEADE OF WILLIAMSBURG 5-star, 22 beds
Methodology

Data source: Medicare Geographic Variation by County (dataset ID: geo-var-county). Vintage: 2023. Downloaded: 2026-04-13. Rows in source: 33,639.

Additional data sources: CDC PLACES County-Level Data (2026) CDC SDOH Measures for County (2017-2021)

Medicare Geographic Variation shows standardized per capita spending, utilization, and demographic characteristics for Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries at the county level. Standardized payments remove geographic payment adjustments to enable fair comparison across regions.

Full methodology →
